---
title: "Resources"
toc: false
---

A short, opinionated list — tool docs, setup pointers, and references.
Not a link dump.

## Available

- [Software setup — VS Code, R, Quarto, TinyTeX, optional Git / Claude Code](software-setup.qmd)
- [Data guidelines — how to choose appropriate datasets](data-guidelines.qmd)
- [AI use guidelines — practical, instructional, course-specific](ai-use-guidelines.qmd)
- [AI reading spine — the published basis for the AI module](ai-reading-spine.qmd)
- [Computer algebra system (CAS) options — Sage, WolframAlpha, SymPy, Maple, others](cas-options.qmd)

## Planned

- A short list of LaTeX references that don't drown beginners
- A `ggplot2` quick reference
- A small Git survival guide (optional)
- A "first 200 lines of R" cheat sheet
